title: How to advertise your aesthetics business
filename: How to advertise your aesthetics business.en.vtt
excerpt: So how do you advertise for new patients the first thing to realize is patients are looking for someone that they trust it's not just about knowing that you exist so make sure your advert builds that in as well as the fact that you have a service that they may be interested in no…

segments.text: so how do you advertise for new patients the first thing to realize is patients are looking for someone that they trust it's not just about knowing that you exist so make sure your advert builds that in as well as the fact that you have a service that they may be interested in now you can then put this message out in various forms you can make it organic just post it on your facebook an instagram feed you could put a poster up and a salon if you wanted to and you can pay instagram and facebook to put this message out to an audience that you choose all of these ways are simply a way to get your message out in front of people but don't forget the people element there are people with a problem looking for someone they trust to solve it and that's what you need to get out into the marketplace
